title: Grabbing attached files into a files column from incoming emails using the Emails & Activities Widget

posts.author: josuexvolt (Josh Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everybody.

I find the Emails & Activities widget really useful but I think I found a limitation.

When receiving an email with an attachment, it would be really nice to have that attachment into a files column automatically. It will save a lot of time. Is there a way to accomplish this? I don’t want to use external apps since I really like how the widget keeps the communication historical.

Thanks for your help.

posts.author: Kevin1283 (Kevin McGee)
posts.cookedHtml: I also need this. Its a feature that monday really needs.

posts.author: elisegflo (Elise G.)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for this. Would be really helpful to auto-add the attached file from “Create items via email” function to the Files column.
